raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "33. Winnas Leeli no Dſeſes/ 
winnas Rahjas bija puſs no 
Dſeſes/ un puſs no Mahla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "34. Scho redſejt tu/ teekams 
weens Akinins noplehſts tappe 
bes Rohkahm/ tas peedaufija to 
Bildi pee winnas Rahjahm/ no 
Dſeſes un Mahla/ un fatreeze 
tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "35. Ta tappe kohpā fatreekti 
Dſeſe/ Mahle/ Warsch/ Sud- 
rabs un Selts/ un tappe ta- 
patt ka Pellus us Waſſaras 
Klohnneem/ un tas Wehjſch tohs 
isofennaja/ ta ka ne lahda Wee- 
ta preekich teem atrasta tappe. 
Bet tas Akinins/ kas to Bildi 
bij fadaufijs/ tappe par leelu 
Kalnu/ teekams winſch wiſſu 
Semuni veepildija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "36. Schis irr tas Sapnis. 
Nu gribbam mehs winna Is- 
stabſtifchanu tam Kehnitam faz- 
ziht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "37. Tu Kehniſch eſti weens 
Kehniſch vahr Kehniſeem/ jo 
tas Debbeſchu Deews irr tew 
Waſtibu/ Warru/ Stiyrumu 
un Gehdu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "38. Ir wiſſur/ kur Zilweki dſih- 
wo/ irr winſch tohs Lohpus Lau- 
ka/ un tohs Putnis appakſch 
Debbeim tawa Rohka Dewis/ 
un tew par Waldtaju pahr to 
wiſſu eezehlis/ tu eſti ta felta 
Balwa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "39. Un pehz terwis zitta Wal- 
a zelſees/ maſaka ne ka tawa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "40. Un ta zettorta Wal- 
buhs zeeta ka Dſeſe. Jo 
ka Dſeſe wiſſu fatreez un fa- 
sa/ teefcham/ tapatt ka D- 
wiffu fatauſa/ ittin ta ſch- 
dauiſhs un fatreeks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "41. Un ka tu eſti redſejß 
Rahjas un winnu Pirkſtus 
no Bohdneeku Mahla/ un 
no Dſeſes/ ta buhs weena 
dallita Walſtiba/ tatschu 
buhs no tahs Dſeſes Sti- 
una eekcha/ itt ka tu eſti re- 
Dſeſi ar Bohdneeku Mah-
fajanktu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "42. Un to Rahju Pir- 
puſs no Dſeſes un puſ- 
Mahla/ ta Walſtiba buhs 
zeeta un puſs wahja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "43. Un ka tu eſti re- 
Dſeſi ar Bohdneeka Mah- 
fajanktu/ ka tee gann zaur zi- 
zigu Dſimmumu fajauktees/ 
weens pee ohtra ne peelipeß/ 
jo ka Dſeſe ar Mahleem ne- 
zahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "44. Pehz tcho Kehniſo E- 
uſzels tas Debbeſchu De- 
weenu Walſtibu/ kas muhs- 
ne taps ispohtita/ un fchi D- 
stiba ne taps zitteem Lau- 
pameſta/ ta fatreeks un iſm- 
nahs wiſſas Walſtibas/ bet- 
ti pastabwehs winna muhs-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "45. Tapehz eſti tu reds- 
ka no ta Kalna weens Aka- 
bes Rohkahm isplehſts tap
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
